name: Panasonic Lumix S5 Mirrorless Camera
description: Well-rounded, lightweight, and sleek, the Panasonic Lumix S5 meshes capable video and photo capabilities with a portable body design. Featuring a full-frame 24.2MP CMOS sensor, the S5 is distinguished by its UHD 4K60 10-bit internal recording, Dual Native ISO, and wide 14+-stop dynamic range.

features.Key Features:: 24.2MP Full-Frame CMOS Sensor | UHD 4K60 Video,10-Bit Internal Recording | V-Log, HDR, and Dual Native ISO | 2.36m-Dot 0.74x-Magnification OLED LVF | 3.0" 1.84m-Dot Free-Angle Touchscreen | Contrast-Detect 225-Area DFD AF System | 5-Axis Sensor-Shift Image Stabilization | ISO 100-51200, up to 7 fps Shooting | 96MP High-Res Mode, Dual SD Card Slots
features.Body Only: 1x Panasonic Lumix DC-S5 Body Only | 1x Panasonic Lithium-Ion Battery | 1x Panasonic Battery Charger | 1x AC Adapter | 1x USB Type-C to USB Type-A Cable | 1x Shoulder Strap | 1x Body Cap | 1x Hot Shoe Cover | 1x Battery Grip Connector Cover | 1x Manual Book | 1x Kartu Garansi Resmi
features.KIt 20-60mm: Panasonic Lumix S5 Mirrorless Camera | Panasonic DMW-BLK22 Lithium-Ion Battery (7.2V, 2200mAh) | Panasonic DMW-BTC15 Battery Charger | USB-C to USB-A Cable | Shoulder Strap | Body Cap | Hot Shoe Cover | Battery Grip Connector Cover | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty | Registration Extension: 2-Year | Panasonic Lumix S 20-60mm f/3.5-5.6 Lens | Front and Rear Lens Caps | Lens Hood | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
